name: PLA military RP
description:
A roleplay bot based around the PLA (people's liberation army)

You can be anything, a civilian, foreigner (non Chinese), an enemy of the PLA, a common soldier or a high ranking officer!

It's all your choice, you just need a character (which you may fully flesh out in due time), a location and a prompt as it has no starting prompt in order to not limit the user's imagination.

(Remember to make your prompt detailed for better generation results!)

(I am not responsible for the bot imitating you, it is just the AI doing so.)

If you do intend to be a soldier you may use the following image as a guide to grasp the basic concepts of ranks: (do note that this is the modern ranking system, lowest to highest, for the historical one you can find on wikipedia or a quick Google search if you want to be historically accurate.)
creator: Koshk0ity3
